revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_more%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{tsh|cat more}} ==Usage== {{Category more|WP:WikiProject}} produces: {{Category more|WP:WikiProject}} {{Category more|WP:WikiProject|l1=WikiProject}} produces: {{Category more|WP:WikiProject|l1=WikiProject}} ==Multiple link targets== * {{Category more|1 BC}} produces: {{Category more|1 BC}} * {{Category more|Talk:1 BC|l1=1 BC}} produces: {{Category more|Talk:1 BC|l1=1 BC}} * {{Category more|1 BC|2 BC}} produces: {{Category more|1 BC|2 BC}} * {{Category more|Talk:1 BC|l1=1 BC|Talk:2 BC|l2=2 BC}} produces: {{Category more|Talk:1 BC|l1=1 BC|Talk:2 BC|l2=2 BC}} * {{Category more|1 BC|2 BC|3 BC}} produces: {{Category more|1 BC|2 BC|3 BC}} * {{Category more|Talk:1 BC|l1=1 BC|Talk:2 BC|l2=2 BC|Talk:3 BC|l3=3 BC}} produces: {{Category more|Talk:1 BC|l1=1 BC|Talk:2 BC|l2=2 BC|Talk:3 BC|l3=3 BC}} * {{Category more|1 BC|2 BC|3 BC|4 BC}} produces: {{Category more|1 BC|2 BC|3 BC|4 BC}} * {{Category more|Talk:1 BC|l1=1 BC|Talk:2 BC|l2=2 BC|Talk:3 BC|l3=3 BC|Talk:4 BC|l4=4 BC}} produces: {{Category more|Talk:1 BC|l1=1 BC|Talk:2 BC|l2=2 BC|Talk:3 BC|l3=3 BC|Talk:4 BC|l4=4 BC}} * {{Category more|1 BC|2 BC|3 BC|4 BC|5 BC}} produces: {{Category more|1 BC|2 BC|3 BC|4 BC|5 BC}} * {{Category more|Talk:1 BC|l1=1 BC|Talk:2 BC|l2=2 BC|Talk:3 BC|l3=3 BC|Talk:4 BC|l4=4 BC|Talk:5 BC|l5=5 BC}} produces: {{Category more|Talk:1 BC|l1=1 BC|Talk:2 BC|l2=2 BC|Talk:3 BC|l3=3 BC|Talk:4 BC|l4=4 BC|Talk:5 BC|l5=5 BC}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateDataHeader}} { "description": "This templates adds a 'For more information, see ...' statement with a maximum of 5 wikilinks. Each link can be labelled with some text. If no label is defined, the link will display with its original page name.", "params": { "1": { "label": "1st link", "type": "wiki-page-name", "required": true, "description": "First wikilink.", "example": "WP:WikiProject" }, "2": { "label": "2nd link", "type": "wiki-page-name", "description": "Second wikilink.", "example": "Earth" }, "3": { "label": "3rd link", "type": "wiki-page-name", "description": "Third wikilink." }, "4": { "label": "4th link", "type": "wiki-page-name", "description": "Fourth wikilink." }, "5": { "label": "5th link", "type": "wiki-page-name", "description": "Fifth wikilink." }, "l1": { "label": "1st link label", "type": "string", "description": "A label for the first wikilink.", "example": "Project" }, "l2": { "label": "2nd link label", "type": "string", "description": "A label for the second wikilink.", "example": "Our planet" }, "l3": { "label": "3rd link label", "type": "string", "description": "A label for the third wikilink." }, "l4": { "label": "4th link label", "type": "string", "description": "A label for the fourth wikilink." }, "l5": { "label": "5th link label", "type": "string", "description": "A label for the fifth wikilink." } }, "paramOrder": [ "1", "l1", "2", "l2", "3", "l3", "4", "l4", "5", "l5" ], "sets": [ { "label": "1st link", "params": ["1", "l1"] }, { "label": "2nd link", "params": ["2", "l2"] }, { "label": "3rd link", "params": ["3", "l3"] }, { "label": "4th link", "params": ["4", "l4"] }, { "label": "5th link", "params": ["5", "l5"] } ] } ==Redirects== * {{Tlx|Category more}} ==See also== {{Category hatnote templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
